mapper.sql: a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.content, a.html_content, a.cover_image, a.author_id, a.category_id, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.status, a.is_top, a.is_recommend, a.publish_time, a.create_time, a.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM article a WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT , u.nickname as author_name, u.avatar as author_avatar, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT , u.nickname as author_name, u.avatar as author_avatar, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.view_count DESC, a.like_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT , u.nickname as author_name, u.avatar as author_avatar, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT , u.nickname as author_name, u.avatar as author_avatar, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 1 AND a.is_recommend = 1 ORDER BY a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, summary, content, html_content, cover_image, author_id, category_id, status, is_top, is_recommend, publish_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{htmlContent}, #{coverImage}, #{authorId}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, #{isTop}, #{isRecommend}, NOW()NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{articleId}
UPDATE article SET like_count = like_count + #{increment} WHERE id = #{articleId}
UPDATE article SET comment_count = comment_count + #{increment} WHERE id = #{articleId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article
AND status = #{status}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) FROM article WHERE status = 1
